iotevents.detectormodel.firehose.Deliver.Docs: The name of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream where the data is written.

iotevents.detectormodel.firehose.Payload.Docs: You can configure the action payload when you send a message to an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.

iotevents.detectormodel.firehose.Separat.Docs: A character separator that is used to separate records written to the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream. Valid values are: 'n' (newline), 't' (tab), 'rn' (Windows newline), ',' (comma).
